schema.description: Request body for processing a card payment via SagePay

booking_id.description: Booking ID to process payment for

card_holder.description: Full name of the card holder

card_number.description: Card number with no spaces or dashes (13-19 digits)

expiry_date.description: Card expiry date in MMYY format

payment_type.description: Payment type — "full" for full balance or "deposit" for deposit only

schema.title: PaymentRequest
